name: Beef Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 green sweet pepper, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
Serves 12
Cut flank steak into 6 portions. Combine meat, onion, green sweet pepper, jalapeno pepper, cilantro, garlic (or garlic powder), cumin, coriander, and salt in a Crock-Pot. Add tomatoes. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours or on HIGH for 4 to 5 hours.
Remove meat from the Crock-Pot and shred. Return meat to the Crock-Pot and stir. To serve fajitas, spread the meat mixture into flour tortillas and top with the toppings if desired. Roll up the tortillas.
Tip: If using fresh jalapenos, handle carefully. Wear rubber gloves if possible as chili peppers contain a volatile oil that will burn if left in direct contact with the skin. Wash hands immediately after handling.
